ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "mob_id" INTEGER /* Mob ID of the character */,
  "mob_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the character (e.g., test, rabbit) */,
  "mob_description" TEXT /* Description of the character */,
  "mob_behavior" INTEGER /* Behavior of the character */,
  "mob_ai" INTEGER /* AI properties of the character */,
  "mob_is_boss" INTEGER /* Is the character a boss? */,
  "mob_is_char" INTEGER /* Is the character a character? */,
  "mob_is_npc" INTEGER /* Is the character an NPC? */,
  "mob_look" INTEGER /* Look of the character */,
  "mob_look_color" INTEGER /* Color of the character's look */,
  "mob_type" TEXT /* Type of the character (e.g., monster, NPC, player) */,
  "mob_race" TEXT /* Race of the character (e.g., human, elf, dwarf) */,
  "mob_class" TEXT /* Class of the character (e.g., warrior, mage, rogue) */,
  "mob_faction" TEXT /* Faction of the character (e.g., alliance, horde) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character the stat belongs to */,
  "mob_vita" INTEGER /* Vita of the character */,
  "mob_mana" INTEGER /* Mana of the character */,
  "mob_experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the character */,
  "mob_hit" INTEGER /* Hit points of the character */,
  "mob_dam" INTEGER /* Damage of the character */,
  "mob_level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "mob_mark" INTEGER /* Mark of the character */,
  "mob_strength" INTEGER /* Strength of the character */,
  "mob_agility" INTEGER /* Agility of the character */,
  "mob_intelligence" INTEGER /* Intelligence of the character */,
  "mob_stamina" INTEGER /* Stamina of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_stats_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character the attribute belongs to */,
  "mob_might" INTEGER /* Might of the character */,
  "mob_grace" INTEGER /* Grace of the character */,
  "mob_will" INTEGER /* Will of the character */,
  "mob_wisdom" INTEGER /* Wisdom of the character */,
  "mob_con" INTEGER /* Constitution of the character */,
  "mob_protection" INTEGER /* Protection of the character */,
  "mob_armor" INTEGER /* Armor of the character */,
  "mob_critical_hit" INTEGER /* Critical hit chance of the character */,
  "mob_critical_miss" INTEGER /* Critical miss chance of the character */,
  "mob_block" INTEGER /* Block chance of the character */,
  "mob_dodge" INTEGER /* Dodge chance of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_attributes_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character the skill belongs to */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "skill_description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  "skill_level" INTEGER /* Level of the skill */,
  "skill_type" TEXT /* Type of the skill (e.g., melee, ranged, magic) */,
  "skill_cooldown" INTEGER /* Cooldown of the skill */,
  "skill_damage" INTEGER /* Damage of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_skills_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character the item belongs to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., sword, shield, potion) */,
  "item_level" INTEGER /* Level of the item */,
  "item_stat" INTEGER /* Stat of the item (e.g., strength, agility, intelligence) */,
  "item_value" INTEGER /* Value of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_items_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., game developer, designer, QA tester) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game data */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character involved in the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., quest, mission, battle) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "event_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character in the relationship */,
  "related_character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related character */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of the relationship (e.g., friend, rival, enemy) */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_relationships_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_relationships_related_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_worlds" (
  "world_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game world */,
  "world_name" TEXT /* Name of the game world */,
  "world_description" TEXT /* Description of the game world */,
  "world_type" TEXT /* Type of the game world (e.g., fantasy, sci-fi, historical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("world_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_worlds" (
  "character_world_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character-world pair */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "world_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game world */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the character joined the world */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_world_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_worlds_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_worlds_world_id FOREIGN KEY ("world_id") REFERENCES game_worlds ("world_id")
)
